message:
feat(workflows/handlers): tick 217 HandleSwarmLearningIndex::execute_step_cx override (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Fourth per-impl Workflow migration. Simpler than ticks 215/216
(no private cass-lookup helper to mirror) — all storage/cass
calls are inline in the step body.

Routes through cx-first siblings:
- Step 0: `storage.get_audit_actions_with_cx(cx, query)` (cooldown)
- Step 1: `storage.get_pane_with_cx(cx, pane_id)` (pane lookup)
- Step 1: `cass.trigger_index_with_cx(cx, workspace)` (cass dispatch)
- Step 1: `storage.record_audit_action_with_cx(cx, audit)` (audit write)
- Pre-step `cx.checkpoint()` gates entry between steps

Legacy `execute_step` preserved verbatim.

Tracing annotation: `explicit_cx = true` on info/warn/error spans.

Verification: 1168 / 1168 workflows:: tests pass under
--features asupersync-runtime via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang,
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Per-impl Workflow migration progress: 4/8+ handlers.rs impls:
- ✅ HandleSessionEnd (tick 214)
- ✅ HandleSessionStartContext (tick 215)
- ✅ HandleOnErrorCassSearch (tick 216)
- ✅ HandleSwarmLearningIndex (this, tick 217)
- HandleAuthRequired / HandleClaudeCodeLimits / HandleGeminiQuota
  (next — can use ctx.send_text_with_cx from tick 213)
- HandleProcessTriageLifecycle (most complex)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
